channel.title: ByteByteGo Newsletter
channel.description: Explain complex systems with simple terms, from the authors of the best-selling system design book series. Join over 1,000,000 friendly readers.

item.title: 【How Netflix Live Streams to 100 Million Devices in 60 Seconds】Netflix 如何在 60 秒内向 1 亿台设备进行直播
item.description: 【In this article, we will look at the architecture of this system and the challenges Netflix faced while building it.】在本文中，我们将了解该系统的架构以及 Netflix 在构建该系统时面临的挑战。

item.title: 【How Agentic RAG Works?】Agentic RAG 是如何工作的？
item.description: 【In this article, we will look at how agentic RAG works, how it improves upon standard RAG, and the trade-offs that should be considered.】在本文中，我们将了解代理 RAG 的工作原理、它如何改进标准 RAG，以及应考虑的权衡。

item.title: 【Last Chance to Enroll | Become an AI Engineer | Cohort-Based Course】最后报名机会 |成为一名人工智能工程师 |队列课程
item.description: 【Our 5th cohort of Becoming an AI Engineer starts in less than a week. This is a live, cohort-based course created in collaboration with best-selling author Ali Aminian and published by ByteByteGo.】我们的第五批“成为人工智能工程师”课程将在不到一周的时间内开始。这是一门基于队列的实时课程，由 ByteByteGo 与畅销书作家 Ali Aminian 合作创建。

item.title: 【EP207: Top 12 GitHub AI Repositories】EP207：前 12 个 GitHub AI 存储库
item.description: 【These repositories were selected based on their overall popularity and GitHub stars.】这些存储库是根据其整体受欢迎程度和 GitHub 星级来选择的。

item.title: 【Event Sourcing Explained: Benefits and Use Cases】事件溯源解释：优点和用例
item.description: 【In this article, we will look at Event Sourcing along with its benefits and trade-offs.】在本文中，我们将研究事件溯源及其优点和权衡。

item.title: 【How OpenAI Codex Works】OpenAI Codex 的工作原理
item.description: 【In this article, we will look at how OpenAI built the right orchestration layer around the model.】在本文中，我们将了解 OpenAI 如何围绕模型构建正确的编排层。

item.title: 【How Reddit Migrated Petabyte-Scale Kafka from EC2 to Kubernetes】Reddit 如何将 PB 级 Kafka 从 EC2 迁移到 Kubernetes
item.description: 【In this article, we will look at the breakdown of this migration, the challenges the engineering team faced, and how they achieved their goal of a successful migration.】在本文中，我们将了解此迁移的详细情况、工程团队面临的挑战以及他们如何实现成功迁移的目标。

item.title: 【How Stripe’s Minions Ship 1,300 PRs a Week】Stripe 的 Minions 如何每周发送 1,300 个 PR
item.description: 【Every week, Stripe merges over 1,300 pull requests that contain zero human-written code. Not a single line. These PRs are produced by “Minions,” Stripe’s internal coding agents, which work completely unattended.】每周，Stripe 都会合并超过 1,300 个包含零人工编写代码的拉取请求。没有一行。这些 PR 由 Stripe 的内部编码代理“Minions”生成，完全无人值守。

item.title: 【EP206: Git Workflow: Essential Commands】EP206：Git 工作流程：基本命令
item.description: 【Git has a lot of commands. Most workflows use a fraction of them.】Git 有很多命令。大多数工作流程只使用其中的一小部分。

item.title: 【Stateless Architecture: Benefits and Tradeoffs】无状态架构：优点和权衡
item.description: 【In this article, we will understand the nuances of stateless architecture in more detail.】在本文中，我们将更详细地了解无状态架构的细微差别。
